description: Pilot — Transfiguration; Moses and Elijah with Him
mustContain: He was changed before them. His face shone like the sun, and His garments became as white as the light.
Behold, Moses and Elijah appeared to them talking with Him.
While he was still speaking, behold, a bright cloud overshadowed them.
mustNotContain: He was changed before them. his face shone like the sun
While He was still speaking, behold, a bright cloud overshadowed them.
